description: A new customer wants to open a basic checking account online.

nodes.task_description: Gather customer's personal information and verify their identity using a provided document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully collects and verifies customer PII against the document.

nodes.task_description: Present available checking account options and their features.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the 'Basic Checking' and 'Interest Checking' accounts.

nodes.task_description: Create the new checking account and provide the customer with their new account number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the account and provides the correct account details.
